examples: ctyun cf custom-domain show example.com --cname-check false
ctyun cf custom-domain update test.mzychaco.email --auth-config '{"authType":"anonymous"}' --domain-name example.com
ctyun cf function invoke my-func --x-fc-invocation-type Async --x-fc-async-delay 0 --x-fc-async-task-id abcd-1234 --qualifier LATEST
ctyun cf function update func01 --update-type basic
ctyun cf alias delete my-func gray
ctyun cf alias show my-func gray
ctyun cf alias update test-function test-alias --version-id 1
ctyun cf alias create my-func --alias-name gray --version-id 1

ctyun cf trigger create testfunc --trigger-name myTrigger --trigger-config '{"cronExpr": "* * * * *","data": "{\"key\":\"chaco\", \"value\":\"good\"}"}' --trigger-type schedule --function-version LATEST
ctyun cf trigger delete test-function httptrigger
ctyun cf trigger show test-function httptrigger
ctyun cf trigger update test-function test-trigger --trigger-config '{"cronExpr": "* * * * *","data": "{\"key\":\"chaco\", \"value\":\"good\"}"}' --function-version LATEST --enable true

parameters.name: max_async_event_age_in_seconds
parameters.description: Max Async Event Age In Seconds

examples: ctyun cf async-config set my-func --async-task true --destination-config '{"onSuccess":{"byname":"LATEST","flag":"version","ksvc":"my-other-func-xxxx","name":"my-other-func","svc":"fc"},"onFailure":{"byname":"LATEST","flag":"version","ksvc":"my-other-func-xxxx","name":"my-other-func","svc":"fc"}}' --max-async-retry-attempts 0 --max-async-event-age-in-seconds 60
ctyun cf layer set-access layer1 --is-public true
ctyun cf async-task show my-func 'e026ae92-61e5-472f-b32d-1c9e3c4e****' --qualifier LATEST
ctyun cf async-task list test --qualifier LATEST --started-time-begin 1640966400000 --started-time-end 1640966400000
ctyun cf async-task stop my-func 11111 --qualifier LATEST
ctyun cf version publish my-func --description 'a test version'

ctyun cf workflow create --name hello-workflow --resource-region bb9fdb42056f11eda1610242ac110002 --execution-mode express --definition 'specVersion: '\''0.8'\''
version: '\''1.0'\''
name: Demo
start: Final

states:
  - name: Final
    type: Operation
    actions:
      - functionRef:
          type: Noop
    end: true
' --execution-timeout 600

ctyun cf workflow update --definition 'specVersion: '\''0.8'\''
version: '\''1.0'\''
name: Demo
start: Final

states:
  - name: Final
    type: Operation
    actions:
      - functionRef:
          type: Noop
    end: true
' --execution-timeout 600
ctyun cf execution start-sync --execution-name execution-1 --workflow-id hello-workflow --input '{'\''a'\'': '\''b'\''}'
ctyun cf execution start --execution-name execution-1 --workflow-id hello-workflow --input '{'\''a'\'': '\''b'\''}'
ctyun cf task-event report-failure --task-token mocktoken --error-type Notfound --error-message 'Item not found'
